snp5.6:1.1:
I ask you, Blessed One.
Please tell me.
snp5.6:1.3: I hope for your words, Great Seer.
snp5.6:1.5:
I’ll train for my own unbinding.
The Buddha:
snp5.6:2.5:
train for your own unbinding.
Dhotaka:
snp5.6:3.1: I see in the world of beings divine & human,
snp5.6:3.2: a brahman who lives possessing nothing.
snp5.6:3.3: I pay homage to him, the All-around Eye.
snp5.6:3.4:
From my perplexities, Sakyan, release me!
The Buddha:
snp5.6:4.1: No one in the world, Dhotaka,
snp5.6:4.3: But knowing the most excellent Dhamma,
snp5.6:4.4:
you will cross over this flood.
Dhotaka:
snp5.6:5.2: the Dhamma of seclusion so that I may know—
snp5.6:5.3: so that I, unafflicted as space,
snp5.6:5.4:
may go about right here, independent, at peace.
The Buddha:
snp5.6:6.1: I will expound to you peace
snp5.6:6.5:
you’ll go beyond entanglement in the world.
Dhotaka:
snp5.6:7.4:
I’ll go beyond entanglement in the world.
The Buddha:
snp5.6:8.4: Knowing it as a bond in the world,
snp5.6:8.5: don’t create craving for becoming or non-.
